data.title: The LBTC transaction volume on Sui's leading ecological project Turbos is close to 1 million US dollars in 24 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, after Sui's top ecological project Turbos Finance launched LBTC, the transaction volume within 24 hours was close to 1 million US dollars.
Yesterday, Turbos announced the launch of Lombard LBTC liquidity pool. BTC holders can pledge BTC to obtain Lombard's LBTC, and add LBTC-WBTC or LBTC-SUI liquidity pools to obtain triple benefits, including Babylon points and Lombard lux points and SUI incentive income.

data.title: CoinDesk 20 Index Sees Mixed Performance With HBAR And DOT Leading Gains
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the CoinDesk 20 Index experienced a slight decline, closing at 2918.27, marking a 0.2% decrease or a drop of 6.41 points since 4 p.m. ET on Thursday. Despite the overall dip, the index saw a mixed performance among its constituents, with thirteen out of the twenty assets showing gains.

Leading the charge were HBAR and DOT, which posted significant increases of 7.0% and 5.2%, respectively. These assets stood out as the top performers in the index, contributing positively to the overall market sentiment. On the other hand, AAVE and ADA emerged as the laggards, each experiencing a decline of 2.9%. This mixed performance highlights the varied market dynamics affecting different digital assets within the index.

The CoinDesk 20 Index is a comprehensive measure of the cryptocurrency market, encompassing a diverse range of assets traded across multiple platforms and regions worldwide. It serves as a barometer for the broader digital asset market, reflecting the performance of leading cryptocurrencies. As the market continues to evolve, the index provides valuable insights into the trends and movements within the cryptocurrency space, offering a snapshot of the current market landscape.

data.title: Story launches public preview of IP Portal, the IP management hub, with core functions officially launched
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News IP blockchain Story announced that its IP management hub IP Portal public preview version is officially launched, opening up core functions such as IP registration, authorization settings, IP management, AI training authorization, and IP search for user experience. In the future, more functions such as smart authorization, royalty automation, dispute resolution, and industry customization will be gradually launched. Compared with the traditional IP management model, IP Portal has higher efficiency and decentralization, and supports one-click generation of compliant licensing agreements for own IP on the chain.

data.title: U.S. May Consider Gold Sale To Fund Bitcoin Reserves, Says Analyst
data.description: According to Odaily, Standard Chartered analyst Geoff Kendrick has suggested that the United States might consider selling a portion of its gold reserves in a budget-neutral manner to fund strategic Bitcoin reserves. Kendrick noted that one option could involve utilizing the Exchange Stabilization Fund (ESF), which holds $39 billion in net assets. He also proposed that under federal leadership, U.S. states and institutional investors, including long-term pension funds, could be encouraged to allocate investments into Bitcoin.

data.title: U.S. Justice Department Charges Garantex Executives with Running Multi-Billion Dollar Crypto Money Laundering Operation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Department of Justice announced a coordinated action with Germany and Finland to shut down the online infrastructure used to operate the cryptocurrency exchange Garantex. Garantex is alleged to have facilitated money laundering and sanctions violations for transnational criminal organizations, including terrorist organizations. Since April 2019, Garantex has processed at least $96 billion in cryptocurrency transactions. Two managers of Garantex were accused of operating a multi-billion dollar crypto money laundering business.

data.title: Binance launches “Vote for Listing” and “Vote for Delisting” community governance mechanisms
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance announced the launch of the "Vote for Listing" and "Vote for Delisting" community governance mechanisms. Users can vote for their favorite projects to be listed, and the projects that receive the highest number of votes and pass the review will be listed on Binance. Users can also vote to remove projects from the monitoring area. Projects that lack product development updates, have inactive communities and teams, fail to regularly update progress, increase token supply without due process, or pose significant risks to users will be placed in the monitoring area.

data.title: ZachXBT: Ripple co-founder Chris Larsen’s wallet was stolen due to LastPass data leak
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chain detective ZachXBT published a post on his personal channel, revealing that according to the asset forfeiture lawsuit filed by the US law enforcement yesterday, Ripple co-founder Chris Larsen suffered a hacker attack worth about US$150 million (283M XRP) in January 2024 because the private key was stored in the password manager LastPass that was hacked in 2022. Previously, Larsen did not disclose the specific reason why the wallet was stolen. The law enforcement agency found that the data breach of LastPass in 2022 caused the attacker to steal the encrypted private key, and then illegally accessed the victim's electronic account and stole the assets.

data.title: Standard Chartered: US may sell part of its gold reserves to buy Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Standard Chartered analyst Geoff Kendrick said that the United States may sell part of its gold reserves in a budget-neutral way to fund strategic Bitcoin reserves to purchase Bitcoin. Geoff Kendrick added that one option is to use the Exchange Stability Fund (ESF), which holds $39 billion in net assets. He also suggested that U.S. states and institutional investors (including long-term pension funds) could be encouraged to allocate to Bitcoin under the leadership of the federal government. (Theblock)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 91,000 USDT with a 1.18% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 07, 2025, 14:56 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 91,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 91,014.703125 USDT, with a narrowed 1.18% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Sol Strategies, the “Solana version of MicroStrategy”, increased its holdings by 24,000 SOL, worth approximately $3.34 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, Sol Strategies, a Canadian Stock Exchange-listed company known as the "Solana version of MicroStrategy", announced that it has increased its holdings of 24,000 SOL, worth approximately US$3.34 million (4.78 million Canadian dollars).
